## Software Developer Lifecycle

<img width ="70%" alt="To reflect like me is to be like me. But you are you, not a reflection of yourself. To understand my essence, you must listen first and speak last. Your test has already begun." src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/49f00bc3-8252-4c68-a11f-6b54b8028a69" />

The mermaid diagram below shows the stages of a **Software Developer Lifecycle**, but they are in the **wrong order**!

**Edit this comment** and reorder the stages in the mermaid diagram so they are in the correct order.

```mermaid
%%{init: {'theme': 'base', 'themeVariables': {'mainBkg': '#ffffff', 'nodeTextColor': '#000000', 'nodeBorder': '#000000', 'lineColor': '#32CD32'}}}%%
graph LR
    A[ANALYSIS] --> B[TESTING] --> C[DESIGN] --> D[DEPLOYMENT] --> E[MAINTENANCE] --> F[DEVELOPMENT]
```

<details>
<summary>Having trouble? 🤷</summary><br/>

> - 💡 **Tip:** Copy the line with the `[ ]` and just edit what is inside the box!
> - 💡 **Tip:** Edit the labels inside the `[ ]` brackets in the mermaid code block to put the stages in the correct order!
> - 💡 **Tip:** Make sure the text inside `[ `] is exactly the same!

</details>
